name: Hot Hoppin' John Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Hot cooked rice (cooked in chicken broth)
16 oz Canned black-eyed peas (rinsed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ham, 1/2 cup onion, and garlic in oil until lightly browned.
2. Stir in rice, peas, hot sauce, pepper, and salt. Cook until thoroughly heated.
3. Place bacon in a large skillet; cook until crisp. Set aside.
4. Drain all but 1 tablespoon drippings from the skillet.
5. Add cabbage and remaining onion to the skillet. Stir-fry until tender-crisp.
6. Spoon the mixture onto a large platter.
7. Ladle the rice mixture into the center of the cabbage.
8. Crumble bacon over top of the salad.
9. Serve hot or at room temperature.
